src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.general_idea: Updated the conditional property annotation to use a new feature flag naming convention.
Changed the endpoint return type from a custom domain object to a List of Strings.
Replaced the instantiation of a custom domain object with an immutable list of strings.
Removed the unused import for the custom domain class that is no longer used in the controller.
Refactored the controller to return a List<String> instead of a custom Messages DTO object.
src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.human_impl: Changed return type to ResponseEntity<List<String>> and used List.of() to construct the response.

src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.general_idea: Updated the Spring @Value annotation to reference a new configuration property key for feature flags.
Removed the import for the now-unused Messages domain class.
Added the necessary import for the java.util.List class used in the new return type.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 11 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
Migrate to Spring Boot 3.4.0 by adopting the spring-boot-starter-parent, which enforces Jakarta EE namespaces and Java 17+ requirements.
Remove the Thymeleaf starter dependency as it is no longer required for the project.
Remove the Bootstrap webjar dependency as it is no longer required.
Remove the Selenium Java dependency as it is no longer used for testing.
Remove the AssertJ core dependency, likely relying on Spring Boot's managed version or removing explicit usage.
Remove the Rest Assured JSON Path dependency, consolidating to the main Rest Assured artifact.
Remove the JUnit Jupiter dependency, relying on Spring Boot Starter Test to manage JUnit 5.
Remove the JUnit 4 dependency as the project has migrated to JUnit 5.
Remove Hamcrest core and library dependencies, relying on Spring Boot Starter Test managed versions.
Remove Mockito core dependency, relying on Spring Boot Starter Test managed version.
Remove explicit Spring Test and Spring Boot Test dependencies, relying on Spring Boot Starter Test.
Remove Spring Boot DevTools dependency.
Add Spring Boot Starter Web dependency explicitly.
Add Spring Boot Starter Test dependency explicitly.
Add Rest Assured dependency explicitly for testing.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.5.2 to support newer Java versions and JUnit 5 features.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe plugin to version 3.5.2 to support newer Java versions and JUnit 5 features.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Report plugin to version 3.5.2.
Add Exec Maven Plugin to allow running the application with specific arguments for local testing.
Configure Surefire plugin to skip unit tests based on a property and exclude integration test packages.
Configure Failsafe plugin to run integration tests based on a property and include specific packages.
Configure Failsafe plugin to run feature toggle integration tests based on a property and include specific packages.
Configure Exec Maven Plugin to run the application with integration test profile and specific port.
Update project groupId and version to reflect the new project structure.
Add properties to control skipping of unit, integration, and feature toggle integration tests.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add standard Gradle build and wrapper exclusion patterns to .gitignore.
Add Spring Tool Suite specific file exclusions to .gitignore.
Expand IntelliJ IDEA exclusions to include workspace and project files.
Add NetBeans project and build directory exclusions to .gitignore.
Add VS Code configuration directory exclusion to .gitignore.

README.md.general_idea: Replace Travis CI build status badge with GitHub Actions badge to reflect the migration of the CI pipeline.
Update the documented required Java JDK version from 11 to 21 to match the target runtime environment.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `Java JDK Version: 11` to `Java JDK Version: 21`

README.md.general_idea: Update the documented required Apache Maven version to 3.9.9 to align with the upgraded build tool.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `Apache Maven Version: 3.6.3` to `Apache Maven Version: 3.9.9`

README.md.general_idea: Update the documented required Gradle version to 8 to align with the upgraded build tool.
Remove documentation for Chrome and Chromedriver dependencies, likely due to changes in testing strategy or Selenium version compatibility.
Standardize Maven commands to use the Maven wrapper (`./mvnw`) instead of the global `mvn` command.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `mvn clean install` to `./mvnw clean install`

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for generating HTML test reports using Maven Surefire plugins.
Update the feature flag property name from `application-config.display-hidden-products` to `feature-flags.enable-conditional-api` to reflect code changes.
Add documentation for running the application with integration test configuration using Maven exec plugin.
Update Gradle run commands to use custom tasks (`runLocal`, `runLocalFt`) instead of `bootRun` with arguments.
Update the documented JAR file version from `1.0-SNAPSHOT-exec` to `0.0.1-SNAPSHOT` to match the new project versioning.
Update Maven skip test flags to use specific property names (`skipUnitTests`, etc.) instead of the generic `skipTests`.
Update Gradle build command to explicitly exclude test tasks instead of using a skip flag.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `./gradlew clean assemble` to `./gradlew clean build -x test -x integrationTest -x ftIntegrationTest`

README.md.general_idea: Update the documented environment variable name for feature toggling to match the new property name.
Add documentation commands for listing available and currently added dependencies using Maven and Gradle.

gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Gradle wrapper distribution URL to version 8.11.1 to support Java 21 features and modern build capabilities.
Add a network timeout configuration to the Gradle wrapper to prevent hanging during distribution downloads.
Enable validation of the Gradle distribution URL checksum to ensure download integrity.

gradlew.general_idea: Replace the legacy Unix startup script with the modern POSIX-compliant version generated by newer Gradle distributions.

gradlew.bat.general_idea: Replace the legacy Windows Gradle wrapper batch script with the modern version generated by newer Gradle distributions.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Added standard Spring Boot application name configuration.
Restructured feature toggle configuration to use a dedicated namespace and environment variable injection.
Introduced a new feature flag for conditional API behavior.
